reason: Tested browser-use feature: agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and reported "Example Domain" in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with agent list visible
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260507-210334-5eb3" in sidebar - Agent chat interface opened with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message appeared in input field with Opus 4.7 · High model selected
Pressed Cmd+Enter to send message - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", "Working... 0s" indicator appeared
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received within 8 seconds with agent status returning to "idle"

Verified response content - Response clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." with tool cards showing "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title" completed successfully; browser preview panel displayed the Example Domain page
